title: Leaf Doctor
content:
You said happiness was a bird
         - a hand extended
        could bend its perch.
        span the perfect wings.

        I spoke of swallows.
        lived off flies
        ebbed when flying.
        seldom came to rest.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Leaf Doctor"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
